fixes_applied: Added/updated pyproject.toml with pythonpath and practical lint config.
Removed asyncio from requirements because it is Python stdlib; added minimum package versions.
Fixed docker-compose demo service so it does not require .env.example as env_file.
Improved Dockerfile with PYTHONUNBUFFERED for live logs.
Hardened real-world stream with process_message, clean max runtime option, signal return, and observation-only docstring.
Added --max-runtime CLI option for safe smoke testing.
Added lightweight JSONL Event Store for auditability and future replay.
Demo mode now appends SignalGenerated events to data/events/events.jsonl.
Added smoke workflow that runs demo, pytest, and Docker build.
Added tests for event store and real-world tick signal generation.
